title: WithFire Upgraded
description: This mod allow you to craft most of the drops that you should have taken from mobs. This is version 1.19.2 of the WithCraft mod.
body:
# WithFire
## Special Notice
This is version 1.19.2 of the WithFire mod, and everything is the same as the original mod.

This was allowed by the original mod's license.
## Description
People have found fire, fire is dangerous, but it can also bring convenience —— With the help of fire, heating food and making handicrafts become easier.

Make something by the campfire to help you survive better. At the same time, with your hands, you can craft most of the drops that you should have taken from mobs —— Even in Peaceful.
## License
This project will follow the origin project's license:
[Academic Free License 3.0](https://github.com/AmarokIce/1.18.2-WithFire/blob/master/LICENSE.txt)
